title: isodon repens
intro: Isodon repens, also known as Chinese sage or Chinese mountain mint, is a perennial plant species belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. The medicinal properties of Isodon repens include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which have been utilized in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential in reducing fever and relieving headaches. Isodon repens can be prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine to enhance its therapeutic effects.
